inputs.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed of the cutting tool relative to workpiece.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed of the cutting tool relative to workpiece.

inputs.label: Depth of Cut (ap)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 8688-1: Radial engagement of the tool.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 8688-1: Radial engagement of the tool.

inputs.label: Tool Overhang (L)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 3685: Free length of tool holder; affects stiffness.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 3685: Free length of tool holder; affects stiffness.

inputs.label: Tool Diameter (D)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 3685: Cutter diameter for milling or turning insert diameter.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 3685: Cutter diameter for milling or turning insert diameter.

inputs.label: Workpiece Material Hardness
inputs.businessContext: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

inputs.label: Machine Spindle Power (P_m)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 841: Rated power of the spindle motor.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 841: Rated power of the spindle motor.

inputs.label: Machine Damping Ratio (ζ)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.

inputs.label: Tool Material
inputs.businessContext: ISO 513: Tool substrate affects wear and stiffness.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 513: Tool substrate affects wear and stiffness.

inputs.label: Coolant Application
inputs.businessContext: ISO 13743: Flood coolant reduces thermal effects and can alter chatter.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 13743: Flood coolant reduces thermal effects and can alter chatter.

rules.message: Cutting speed to feed ratio too low; risk of built-up edge and chatter.
Tool overhang-to-diameter ratio exceeds 4:1; stiffness insufficient, chatter likely.
Estimated cutting power exceeds spindle capacity; reduce parameters.

thresholds.alert: Critical chatter level detected; surface quality severely compromised.
Surface roughness exceeds target by 50%; rework or scrap likely.
Total quality loss exceeds 10%; investigate root cause immediately.

formulas.name: Chatter Index (CI)
formulas.description: Dimensionless indicator of chatter severity based on dynamic stability.

formulas.name: Target Surface Roughness (Ra_target)
formulas.description: Theoretical surface roughness based on feed and tool nose radius (assumed 0.8 mm).

formulas.name: Actual Surface Roughness (Ra_actual)
formulas.description: Adjusted for chatter: Ra_actual = Ra_target * (1 + 2 * chatter_index).

formulas.name: Material Hardness Factor (K_H)
formulas.description: Correction factor for workpiece hardness relative to medium (200 HB).

formulas.name: Tool Material Factor (K_T)
formulas.description: Empirical factor based on tool material (HSS=1.2, Carbide=1.0, Ceramic=0.8, CBN=0.6).
formulas.formula: CASE tool_material WHEN 'hss' THEN 1.2 WHEN 'carbide' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'ceramic' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'cbn' THEN 0.6 ELSE 1.0 END

formulas.name: Coolant Factor (K_C)
formulas.description: Reduction factor if coolant is applied (0.9 with coolant, 1.0 without).

formulas.name: Total Quality Loss Percentage (Q_loss)
formulas.description: Primary result: percentage of parts that fail surface quality due to chatter.
formulas.formula: Q_loss = 100 * (1 - EXP(-0.5 * chatter_index * material_hardness_factor * tool_material_factor * coolant_factor))

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Dynamic Compliance
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Low machine damping and high overhang increase chatter amplitude.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Process Damping
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Negative effect of low cutting speed on stability (process damping reduction).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Regenerative Effect
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Waviness from previous cut amplifies chatter; function of depth of cut and feed.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce tool overhang to below 3x diameter
suggestedActions.expectedImprovement: Reduces chatter index by up to 40%

suggestedActions.label: Increase machine damping (tune dampers or use tuned mass damper)
suggestedActions.expectedImprovement: Reduces chatter index by up to 30%

suggestedActions.label: Adjust cutting speed to avoid resonant spindle speeds
suggestedActions.expectedImprovement: Reduces chatter index by up to 25%

suggestedActions.label: Ensure flood coolant is applied to reduce thermal softening and friction
Use CBN or ceramic tool for harder materials
suggestedActions.expectedImprovement: Reduces tool material factor by up to 20%
